notes: This is a core-seed, SOURCE_NEEDED ruleset. Its formulas are implementation-corroborated (iztro comparator, S-05/S-06) and finite-domain coherent, but NOT historically source-reviewed against an identified primary edition. The Four-Transformations table's Geng (庚) and Ren (壬) HUA_KE cells are contested between schools/editions (see transformations.json). No combination of schema validation, finite-domain testing, and implementation comparison is labeled historically verified.

claim_language.IMPLEMENTATION_CORROBORATED: another implementation follows the same rule.
claim_language.SOURCE_REVIEWED: a selected ruleset source has been reviewed and recorded.
claim_language.SOURCE_NEEDED: insufficient authority for a final rule or historical claim.
claim_language.BLOCKED: must not be presented as fact or universal behavior.

sources.supports: Formula seed, stated conventions, terminology, claims under audit
sources.limits: Not an identified primary edition; contains at least one token error and unsupported completeness claims
Does not supply a Chinese lunisolar calendar
BaZi Da-Yun reuse must be named and tested for the selected ZWDS ruleset

sources.source: Chinese Wikipedia article on 紫微斗數, history and calculation sections
sources.supports: Describes Chen Tuan as traditional attribution; documents 14 major stars, calculation sequence, Four-Transformation variants, and late-Zi alternatives
sources.limits: Article itself flags source-quality issues; use only to prove that competing conventions exist, not as final authority

sources.supports: Corroborates core formula structure and exposes configurable conventions
sources.limits: Software agreement is not historical proof

sources.supports: Concrete comparator vectors for palace, bureau and star placement
sources.limits: Not an independent practitioner-approved FuFirE golden corpus

sources.source: Unicode/typed ID policy in project skill
sources.supports: Separating Heavenly Stem, Earthly Branch and animal tokens
sources.limits: Not an authority for ZWDS school selection
